positive: A central, stylized illustration of a cosmic phoenix rising from abstract geometric smoke. The phoenix should have clean, sharp feather designs and vibrant plumage in deep indigo, gold leaf, and burnt orange. It is surrounded by minimalist, interwoven celestial constellations and nebulae in shades of purple and cyan. The overall composition is symmetrical and impactful, designed for a clean print area. Style: Neo-Art Deco combined with modern graphic novel aesthetics. Lighting: Highly dramatic, emanating strongly from behind the phoenix to create a clear silhouette and high contrast against a solid, rich midnight blue background. Focus on strong black lines and bold, block color areas, ensuring the final design is perfect for apparel screen printing.
negative: blurry, fuzzy, low contrast, text, watermark, signature, noise, artifacts, extra limbs, bad anatomy, muted colors, messy, bokeh, photographic
